example_sentence: No puedo hablar ahora, tengo junta en cinco minutos.
example_translation: I can't talk now, I have a meeting in five minutes.

translation: I remain at your service (standard Mexican business email closing)
example_sentence: Cualquier duda, quedo a sus órdenes.
example_translation: For any questions, I remain at your service.

example_sentence: El plazo para entregar el informe es el lunes.
example_translation: The deadline for submitting the report is Monday.

example_sentence: Tenemos que ajustarnos al presupuesto aprobado.
example_translation: We need to stay within the approved budget.

translation: we agreed that / it was agreed that
example_sentence: Quedamos en que el equipo entregaría los resultados el jueves.
example_translation: We agreed that the team would deliver the results on Thursday.

example_sentence: Todos los empleados nuevos pasan por una semana de capacitación.
example_translation: All new employees go through a week of training.

translation: we are willing to / we are prepared to
example_sentence: Estamos dispuestos a revisar los términos del contrato.
example_translation: We are willing to review the terms of the contract.

translation: professional title for university graduates in Mexico
example_sentence: Buenos días, licenciado García, ¿podemos hablar un momento?
example_translation: Good morning, Mr. García, can we speak for a moment?

example_sentence: ¿Alguien tiene el orden del día para la junta de hoy?
example_translation: Does anyone have the agenda for today's meeting?

example_sentence: En los negocios mexicanos, las relaciones son lo primero.
example_translation: In Mexican business, relationships come first.

example_sentence: Por favor, envíeme la factura a la brevedad.
example_translation: Please send me the invoice as soon as possible.

example_sentence: Los resultados del trimestre superaron las expectativas.
